assertions.description: Hall sensor output circuit (open-collector with indicator LED) not detected as a signal pattern. The HX6286 VOUT drives LED indicator through solder jumper and series resistor - this is a common hall sensor indicator topology
The solder jumper JP1 as an LED enable/disable feature is not noted as a design pattern
REVIEW: SIGNAL net listed as a power rail for U1 in power_domains - the VOUT pin is open-collector output, not a power rail. SIGNAL should be classified as signal/output only

REVIEW: PWR_FLAG warnings claim GND and VDD have no PWR_FLAG, but the schematic has 2 PWR_FLAG symbols visible in power_symbols section. The PWR_FLAG detection is not recognizing them as satisfying the ERC requirement
